meaning: adj.难取悦的,挑剔的,苛求的,(微生物等)需要复杂营养地
examples: Everything was planned in fastidious detail.
She wasn't very fastidious about personal hygiene.
He was fastidious in his preparation for the big day.
Whirlpool and Maytag are designing appliances (like Personal Valet, a home dry cleaning gadget) for fastidious male homeowners.
Perhaps worst of all to the fastidious and those with appearances to keep up, rubbish chutes will be closed.
